things.name: Victoria Falls Viewpoints
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage world's largest waterfall - 16 viewpoints along the 1.7km Zimbabwe side

things.name: Devil's Pool (Dry Season Swim)
things.description: Swim in a natural pool at the very lip of the falls with a 100m drop below you

things.name: White Water Rafting (Grade 5)
things.description: Some of the world's best white water rafting through Batoka Gorge

things.name: Bungee Jumping from Victoria Falls Bridge
things.description: 111m bungee jump from the bridge between Zimbabwe and Zambia

things.name: Sunset Cruise on the Zambezi
things.description: Hippos and crocodiles as the sun sets upstream from the falls

things.name: Victoria Falls Walking Safari
things.description: Walking safari through Zambezi National Park with white rhino and elephant

things.name: Microlight Flight over the Falls
things.description: Ultralight aircraft flight over the waterfall and wildlife from above

things.name: Elephant Interaction at Elephant Camp
things.description: Walk with and feed trained African elephants in the bush

things.name: Victoria Falls Hotel Afternoon Tea
things.description: Tea on the terrace of the 1904 colonial hotel with Falls spray on the horizon

things.name: Victoria Falls Market
things.description: Mbira thumb pianos, Shona stone carvings and hand-painted fabrics
